Home / Art Gallery / Decorative Panels
Collection 05

Decorative Panels

“Large scale demands clarity, courage and vision.”

The Decorative Panels of contemporary artist Nona Dronova present large-scale compositions, many exceeding one metre in size. Working in this format requires artistic confidence, a strong sense of composition and a distinctly decorative approach.

Every element must remain expressive at both close and long viewing distances, allowing colour, rhythm and form to shape the surrounding architectural space. These panels are conceived not simply as paintings but as integral parts of an interior, where scale enhances emotional impact and transforms the atmosphere of a room.

Monumental format gives colour greater presence, decorative rhythm greater strength and the artist’s visual language a powerful spatial dimension.

“A large painting does not fill a wall—it transforms a space.”
